# CallerOS — Custom Software Development

> Custom web apps, CRMs, and internal platforms for businesses in El Paso, TX and Ciudad Juárez. Available in English and Spanish.

## About

Demian Calleros is a full-stack developer and founder of CallerOS, a software development studio based on the US–Mexico border (El Paso, TX / Ciudad Juárez, Chihuahua). We specialize in building custom software that helps businesses operate more efficiently — replacing manual work with centralized platforms, automating processes, and giving teams real-time visibility into their operations.

We work primarily with small and mid-sized businesses in the US and Mexico, and we communicate fluently in both English and Spanish.

## Services

- Custom web application development
- Internal business platforms and operations tools
- CRM and client management systems
- Mobile applications (web, desktop, and mobile — single codebase)
- API development and backend systems
- Database architecture and performance optimization

## Technology Stack

Frontend: React, Flutter, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
Backend: Node.js, Golang, FastAPI (Python)
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis
Infrastructure: Docker, JWT authentication, REST APIs
Mobile: Flutter/Dart (iOS, Android, desktop)

## Selected Projects

**Anson General** — Internal operations platform for Anson General Contracting LLC, a US general contractor based in El Paso, TX. Built with Flutter, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, and Redis. Available on web, desktop, and ready for mobile. Features 4 role-based access levels, email verification, admin panel, and real-time team management.

**Subrogates – IMSS** — Operations coordination platform for IMSS (Mexico's Social Security Institute) to centralize and track medical service subrogation processes. Replaced manual spreadsheet workflows with automated alerts and real-time management dashboards. Built with React and Golang.

**ArenasCRM** — Custom CRM for a service business. Centralizes client profiles, appointment scheduling, team task management, and revenue tracking. Built with React, Node.js, MySQL, and Golang.

Currently open to new projects. We typically respond within the same business day.
